name: add watermark on my Microsoft Word

steps.tooltip: Click the "Design" tab to access document formatting options.
steps.explanation: The Design tab contains tools for page background, themes, and watermarks.

steps.tooltip: Click "Watermark" to add text or an image behind your document's content.
steps.explanation: This opens a gallery of predefined watermarks and options to create custom ones.
Selecting a watermark automatically applies it to all pages of your document.
